prompt: Create a vertically oriented crude doodle-style mirror selfie illustration on a plain white background. Show a young woman standing in front of a tall rectangular mirror, drawn with loose black sketch lines, messy uneven strokes, and simple flat colors like a casual phone doodle. She has long voluminous wavy dark brown hair, tan skin, gold hoop earrings, a tiny yellow necklace detail, and wears a tight short black sleeveless mini dress with a low neckline. Her face is intentionally hidden by a centered square blur/mosaic block in beige tones. Her left arm is raised holding a large gray smartphone with three black camera lenses, covering part of her face and chest; her right arm hangs down with long fingers and simple nail details. The body proportions are fashion-sketch-like but rough, with exaggerated long legs cropped near mid-thigh at the bottom. Behind her, include a simple bedroom vanity/mirror scene: one large outlined mirror rectangle behind her head and upper body, two yellow lamps on left and right side tables, a sketchy dresser on the right with drawers, a small pink item on top, and rough black furniture lines. Surround the figure with exactly 19 decorative doodles: 5 hearts (pink heart with smiling face in upper left, small black heart near top center, pink heart on left middle, small black heart on right middle, outlined black heart near lower right), 6 stars (yellow star upper left, black star upper right, pink star right of hair, pink star lower left, black star bottom left, yellow sparkle lower right), 3 sparkle marks (yellow rays above mirror, yellow sparkle on right middle, pink sparkle near bottom left), 3 arrows/gesture marks (black rays near phone, large black curved arrow lower left, black arrow pointing up near lower center-right), and 2 scribble clusters (black scribble left middle, pink scribble lower right). Use childlike hand-drawn linework, no realistic rendering, no polished shading, and keep the composition centered like a playful crude doodle based on a mirror selfie. No readable text, no watermark.
